series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Home Care Enrollment and Waiting List Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Documentation to include waiting lists, slot release spreadsheets, ODM 02399 Home and Community Based Service Waiver Application, and all written notifications.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office three (3) years and ; Electronic: in office three (3) years receipt of final payment or any audit Findings or lawsuits have been resolved
